epic_goal: Implementation Task - Effective instruction bundle service and ordered boot emission
task_title: Implementation Task - Effective instruction bundle service and ordered boot emission
done: Effective bundle receipt semantics hardened with more unique receipt ids and explicit reserved optional-triggered field semantics
open_risks: optional triggered reads remain intentionally empty until trigger-matrix runtime exists
task_context: Implement a system service that resolves the ordered effective instruction bundle for boot/runtime, emits mandatory instruction chain output in one pass, and records optional-condition activation separately.
